checks.assertion: The external HTTPS link, email link, inline Smart Link, and block Smart Link are present without a rendering error.
checks.actual: All four link forms were present in the authenticated DOM.

checks.assertion: The internal page link is present and the page anchor scrolls to the media section.
checks.actual: The internal page link was present and clicking the media anchor exposed the target section.

checks.assertion: The excerpt include resolves content from the macros laboratory page.
checks.actual: The rendered excerpt contained 'Campaign excerpt content available to another page.'

checks.assertion: The image section renders its PNG and caption without an error.
checks.actual: The PNG and caption were visible in the authenticated page.

checks.assertion: The JPEG loads as an image/jpeg resource at its configured right alignment and 360-pixel width.
The GIF loads at its natural size and visibly changes frames across its 600-millisecond frame interval.
The PDF, MP4, MP3, CSV, and text attachment controls are all present in the page.
The PDF tile opens a preview dialog with a nonzero size and Download control.
checks.actual: campaign-preview.pdf opened as a 2 KB document with Download and no load error.

checks.assertion: The MP4 preview exposes working playback and Download controls.
checks.actual: campaign-video.mp4 opened as 2.6 MB, played a 5-second H.264/AAC stream, and exposed seek, volume, speed, fullscreen, and Download controls.

checks.assertion: The MP3 preview exposes working playback and Download controls.
checks.actual: campaign-audio.mp3 opened, exposed a two-second playback timeline and Download, and reported no load error.

checks.assertion: The CSV preview exposes its expected rows and a Download control.
checks.actual: The preview contained the header 'capability,format,result', the expected smart-link row, and Download.

checks.assertion: The text preview exposes the in-place revision and a Download control.
checks.actual: The preview showed the revision-two sentence from attachment version 2 and Download.

checks.assertion: The in-place text attachment revision retains its attachment identity and exposes revision-two content.
